captures.notes: Fresh launch before project selection; onboarding CTA visibility baseline.
Project configured and full pipeline executed on demo fixture.
Manifest and extracted file table visible after scan.
Asset tree and archive report visible without active item selection.
Selected asset shows metadata and preview fallback/ready state.
Entry table populated with large demo dataset.
Language filter active for French rows.
Long query with placeholders/tags applied to stress search toolbar layout.
Language overview/queue/backend block populated from project metrics.
Language review and localization stress blocks populated for manual triage.
Backend transparency and translated table populated.
Long manual correction text entered to stress form and typography fit.
Voice attempts visible with no selected row.
Voice preview/duration panels filled for selected attempt.
Correction/adaptation history visible.
Glossary table and add-term controls visible.
QA findings table populated from pipeline run.
Translation/language/QA summary widgets populated.
Backend diagnostics and report history visible.
Export panel contains last export details and paths.
Jobs panel contains structured runtime payload.
Live demo scene selector contains fixture scenes and active selection.
Companion tab in safe idle mode without running session.
Companion fields prefilled with invalid executable for pre-launch validation checks.
